description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a symmetrical facade, featuring a prominent balcony running the length of the upper floor and a covered porch below. The exterior is finished in a light color with dark accents, and the roof is a simple gable style with gray shingles. The property includes a paved driveway, two parked cars, and landscaped elements such as palm trees and deciduous trees. A backyard area features a swimming pool, a patio with an umbrella, and outdoor seating. The windows are arranged in neat, symmetrical rows on both floors, and the main entryway is centrally located with steps leading up to a covered porch supported by columns. The overall design is modern with colonial influences, emphasizing clean lines and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a gable roof, symmetrical balconies, a covered porch, and landscaped outdoor areas including a pool and driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, two cars parked in the driveway, palm trees, and the full width of the balcony and porch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, palm trees, and the symmetrical window arrangement on the house's side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, patio umbrella, outdoor seating, and additional landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool area, patio, and the rear entry to the house, with visible landscaping elements.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with steps, covered porch, and supporting columns
